PARAM.name: Publisher
PARAM.DESCRIPTION:
Copyright 2019-2026 Caltech, Support from NASA is acknowledged. This information is taken from a collection created and curated by the NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), operated by the California Institute of Technology (Caltech). If your research benefits from the use of NED, the following acknowledgement in your paper would be appreciated:
"This research has made use of the NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), which is funded by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration and operated by the California Institute of Technology."
See: https://ned.ipac.caltech.edu/Documents/Overview/Acknowledgments

FIELD.name: No.
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A row number applicable to this list only

FIELD.name: Bandpass
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Bandpass at which the data were measured

FIELD.name: Measurement
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Photometry value as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Unc High
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Photometry upper uncertainty as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Unc Low
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Photometry lower uncertainty as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Unit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Photometry unit as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Frequency (Hz)
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Frequency value as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: Flux Density
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Flux density value as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: FD Unc High
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Upper uncertainty of flux density as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: FD Unc Low
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Lower uncertainty of flux density as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: FD Upper Limit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Upper limit of flux density as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: FD Lower Limit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Lower limit of flux density as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: Flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Flux value as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: F Unc High
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Upper uncertainty of flux as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: F Unc Low
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Lower uncertainty of flux as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: F Upper Limit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Upper limit of flux as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: F Lower Limit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Lower limit of flux as standardized by NED

FIELD.name: Telescope
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Telescope as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Instrument
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Instrument as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Frequency
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Frequency value as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Freq. Unit
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Frequency unit as published and interpreted by NED team

FIELD.name: Aperture Type
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Aperture Type as published and interpreted by NED team (e.g. flux in fixed aperture, total flux)

FIELD.name: Reference
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Bibliographic reference code
